Tiga Credit Card – Apply Online for 3× Rewards & Interest Free Benefits
The Equitas Tiga Credit Card is a rewards‐oriented digital credit card product that offers features like up to 50 days interest-free credit, 3× reward points on UPI/Contactless/Pay-by-3 merchant spends, and various insurance & waiver benefits.
Key Features
Pay by 3
Earn 3x Reward Points on UPI, Contactless payments & pay-by-3 merchants*.
Pay by 3
Automatically convert transactions with select merchants* into a 3-month Low-cost EMI.
Introductory Low Annual Percentage Rate
Low interest rate of just 0.99% p.m. for the first 3 months*
Reward Points on Every Spend
Earn 1 Reward Point for every Rs 100 spent on everyday transactions
Benefits
Additional Features & Benefits
Additional Features & Benefits
Limited Period Offer: Get Your First Year Free Tiga Card today Excluding GST.
Spend Rs. 1,20,000 in the previous anniversary year to get your renewal fee waived.
Pay by 3 Merchants List - Tata Cliq, Skull Candy, Tony & Guy, Tony & Guy Essentuals, 1% Club, Lectrix, Prashanthi Sareex`s, Netmeds, SLAM Fitness, Wedtree
Enjoy peace of mind with lost card liability. Refer terms and Conditions
Fuel Surcharge Waiver: Save more with a 1% waiver on fuel transactions across India (up to Rs. 100 per statement cycle on transactions between Rs. 500 and Rs. 3,000).
Interest-Free Credit: Enjoy up to 50 days of interest-free credit on your spending.
Enjoy 3X rewards on transactions via UPI, Contactless & Pay by 3 merchants. Earn 1RP on every Rs.100 spent. 1 RP= 0.15
Xchange Program: Redeem your reward points against Products/ Vouchers/ Flight Booking and more. https://xchange.equitas.bank.in/ .
Equitas Bank Credit Card Customers are requested to check with their preferred brand’s policy on accepting single/multiple vouchers against a single invoice and accordingly decide to redeem their reward points from Xchange Rewards Portal. Bank will not be responsible for any rejects from the brand on not allowing to use multiple vouchers under a single purchase/invoice, as that will purely be the brand’s decision only.
Mandate HQ: Automate and simplify your recurring payments to never miss a due date.

FAQs
What are the main credit card types? -
TIGA Credit Card
Category: Lifestyle & Rewards Card
Best for: Everyday spending, short-term EMI flexibility
Key Highlights:
• Pay by Three: Automatically converts eligible transactions on select merchants* into 3-month low cost EMI.
• 3X Rewards on UPI, Contactless payments & Pay by Three merchants — earn faster on everyday spends.
• Annual Fee: First Year Free (subject to bank’s conditions), Rs 500 from subsequent years.
• Joining Perks: Introductory low-rate EMI (0.99% for the 1st three months) & high rewards on initial spends.
• Introductory APR: 0.99% PM for the first 3 months from card open date.
• Pay by three merchants – TATA Cliq, Tony & Guy, Tony & Guy Essentuals, SLAM, Netmeds, Skull Candy, 1% Club, Prashanti Sarees, Wedtree, Lectrix
• Eligibility Criteria: Annual income of Rs 4.2 – 5 lakhs.
Ideal For:
People who want flexibility to split purchases into EMIs and earn extra rewards on UPI and tap-to-pay transactions.
Features:
Focus: Tiga - Everyday EMI & Rewards
Special Benefit: Tiga - Pay-by-Three EMI
Reward Type: Tiga - 3X on UPI & Tap
Annual Fee: Tiga - 1st Year Free
Ideal For: Tiga - Flexible Spenders
How can I redeem Credit Card points for rewards? +
Equitas uses a rewards portal called Xchange (xchange.equitas.bank.in) for redeeming reward points.
You can redeem for products, vouchers, flight / hotel booking, etc. The card’s Terms & Conditions / MITC specifies the catalogue, valuation, and conditions for redemption.
The exact value per point / the minimum points required / where you can redeem depends on which card you have and which redemption option (product, voucher, travel) you select.
How do I apply for a Credit Card online? +
Visit the Equitas Bank Website’s Credit Cards section.
Choose the variant (TIGA, SELFE or PowerMiles) and click “Apply Now.” Or by giving missed call 1800 103 2977
You will be asked to provide KYC, identity, address, income proofs, etc., to complete an online / offline application form. (Standard card application flow implied)
The bank will verify your eligibility and documents and, if approved, dispatch the card. (You may also need to activate it with first transaction or PIN setup)
The application flow and decisioning may be instantaneous or take some time depending on internal checks.
What are the advantages of using Equitas Credit Cards? +
Here are the main benefits per card, plus general advantages:
TIGA Card Benefits
• 3× rewards on UPI, contactless payments, and on Pay-by-3 merchant spends
• “Pay by 3” — eligible transactions with select merchants can be auto converted into a 3-month low cost
EMI
• Up to 50 days of interest-free credit period for regular purchases
• Fuel surcharge waiver: 1% waiver on fuel transactions (within certain transaction bands)
• Insurance / protection covers: air accident, credit shield, lost card liability etc. (for primary cardholder)
Are there any charges for redemption of reward points? +
Yes, the Equitas “Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC)” document lists several fees, and redemption governed by reward programme rules.
Key points:
• Joining / Annual Fees
• TIGA: ₹500 (joining) + ₹500 (annual)
• Cash Advance / ATM Withdrawal Charges
2.5% of the amount withdrawn (or ₹250, whichever is higher). Also, finance charges apply from day of withdrawal till full repayment.
• Other Charges / Fees
• The bank may levy other charges (late payment, over limit, return of payment, etc.) as per the Schedule of Charges in the Card Agreement / MITC.
•  Redemption handling / administrative charges (if any) would be specified in the rewards programme terms (the MITC / catalogue) — it is possible that some redemptions may carry a small fee or conversion cost. (I didn’t find a publicly explicit “redemption fee” in the MITC I reviewed, so you will need to check the latest catalogue or rewards terms)
• Waiver of Annual Fee
• TIGA: The annual fee may be waived if you spend a certain threshold in the anniversary year (e.g. ₹1,20,000)
So yes — while redemption may not always incur a direct separate fee (depending on the option), there are various fees built into the cards’ terms, and you must see the “Schedule of Charges / rewards programme” for your card variant.
How to register complaints related to my credit card? +
Register a complaint through the following ways:-
Selfe loan app
Customer care helpline number 18001032977
Write to customerservice@equitas.bank.in from your registered mail id
You can also lodge a complaint at RBI’s Sachet Portal
Application forms complete in all respects will be processed within 30 days from the date of receipt of application form.
Wherever additional information / documentation is required to process the application form, the same shall be intimated to the customer within 30 days from the date of receipt of the application form.

Selfe Credit Card – Apply Online for Interest Free & 5X Reward Benefits
The Equitas Selfe Credit Card is a digital-first card that can be applied for online without paperwork. It offers interest-free periods, attractive 5X rewards on spends, and easy online management, making it an ideal choice for customers seeking a seamless and rewarding credit card experience.
Key Features
Choice of Accelerated Rewards
Earn 5X rewards on 2 out of 5 categories that matter to you: Apparel, Dining, Grocery, Utility and Taxi
Choice of Membership
Choose 2 complimentary memberships from top platforms like Amazon Prime, Jio Hotstar, Sony Liv, Zee5, or Discovery+
Choice of Card Style
Personalize your card style by choosing from regular, eco-friendly or sleek metal
Choice of Payment Network
Choose between Visa & RuPay for seamless payments
Choice of Preferred Billing Date
Choose a billing date that works best for you- 12th, 16th & 20th of every month
Domestic Lounge
Enjoy one complimentary domestic lounge access per calendar quarter
Earn Reward Points
Earn 2 Reward Points for every Rs 100 spent, rewarding you on everyday transactions
Your Choice Matters!
Card Variants
Card Variants
Choose your Selfe
Equitas Selfe Credit Cards are available in 3 unique design options that reflects your personality.
Regular Card
Our classic blue plastic credit card boasts a sleek, minimalist design and comes with no additional fees, making it a practical choice for your financial needs.
Green Card
Support for a better tomorrow by choosing our Recycled Plastic Credit Cards. Eco-friendly Credit cards reduces the use of plastic by offering a more sustainable replacement of the plastic cards.
Metal Card
Elevate your choices by adding Metal Credit Card in your wallet. Enjoy all the features of Equitas Selfe Credit Card with the power of Metal in your hand.
Benefits
Additional Features & Benefits
Additional Features & Benefits
Limited Period Offer: Get Your First Year Free Selfe Card today Excluding GST.
Spend Rs. 2,40,000 in the previous anniversary year to get your renewal fee waived. Enjoy peace of mind with lost card liability. Refer Terms & Conditions
Fuel Surcharge Waiver: Save more with a 1% waiver on fuel transactions across India (up to Rs. 250 per statement cycle on transactions between Rs. 500 and Rs. 3,000).
Interest-Free Credit: Enjoy up to 50 days of interest-free credit on your spending.
Earn 5X rewards on spends in the categories chosen by you. Earn 2RP on every Rs.100 spent. 1 RP= 0.35
Xchange Program: Redeem your reward points against Products/ Vouchers/ Flight Booking and more. https://xchange.equitas.bank.in/ . A video guide for claiming Selfe Credit Card Memberships Xchange Rewards
The Memberships offered for Selfe Credit Card customer will be available once the card is activated by the customer. These memberships should be claimed within 90 days from the card issuance date. Please note that the membership details will be made available for claim on T+1 date from the card activation date. Customers can visit xchange.equitas.bank.in to claim their membership vouchers. If Membership benefits (complimentary offer) is not claimed before the said timeline, then such benefits will get expired and cannot be renewed. Please refer T&C for more information.
Equitas Bank Credit Card Customers are requested to check with their preferred brand’s policy on accepting single/multiple vouchers against a single invoice and accordingly decide to redeem their reward points from Xchange Rewards Portal. Bank will not be responsible for any rejects from the brand on not allowing to use multiple vouchers under a single purchase/invoice, as that will purely be the brand’s decision only.

• Choice of Memberships: Pick 2 premium memberships from popular brands (e.g., Amazon Prime, Jio, Hotstar, Sony LIV, Zee5, Discovery+) — as part of your joining benefits.
• Choice of Accelerated Rewards: Get 5X rewards on any 2 categories of your choice from Apparels, Dining, Utility, Grocery & Taxi.

• Choice of network: Choose your network between VISA & Rupay
• Travel Benefits: Enjoy one complimentary domestic lounge per calendar quarter.
• Annual Fee: First Year Free (conditions apply).
• Customizable Experience: You choose what benefits matter most to you.
Ideal For:
Those who like personalization, digital subscriptions, and flexible reward categories to maximize value.

How can I redeem Credit Card points for rewards? +
Equitas uses a rewards portal called Xchange (xchange.equitasbank.com) for redeeming reward points.
You can redeem for products, vouchers, flight / hotel booking, etc. The card’s Terms & Conditions / MITC specifies the catalogue, valuation, and conditions for redemption.
The exact value per point / the minimum points required / where you can redeem depends on which card you have and which redemption option (product, voucher, travel) you select.
How do I apply for a Credit Card online? +
Visit the Equitas Bank Website’s Credit Cards section.
Choose the variant (TIGA, SELFE or PowerMiles) and click “Apply Now.” Or by giving missed call 1800 103 2977
You will be asked to provide KYC, identity, address, income proofs, etc., to complete an online / offline application form. (Standard card application flow implied)
The bank will verify your eligibility and documents and, if approved, dispatch the card. (You may also need to activate it with first transaction or PIN setup)
The application flow and decisioning may be instantaneous or take some time depending on internal checks.
What are the advantages of using Equitas Credit Cards? +
Here are the main benefits per card, plus general advantages:
SELFE Card Benefits
• Choice of 2 memberships (Amazon Prime, Jio/Hotstar, Zee5, Sony LIV, etc.) as part of your benefits. Choice of 2 reward categories out of five (Apparel, Dining, Grocery, Utility, Taxi) where you’ll earn 5× points
• Standard rewards on all other spends
• Up to 50 days interest-free credit on regular purchases
• Fuel surcharge waiver, insurance covers, and domestic lounge (1 per quarter) benefit for SELFE
General Advantages
• Flexibility of interest-free credit period (if you pay full within due date)
• Rewards / points for your everyday spending
• Perks like fuel surcharge waiver, insurance, lounge access (for premium)
• Ability to convert large purchases into EMIs (for TIGA)
• Multiple redemption options via Equitas’s rewards portal
Are there any charges for redemption of reward points? +
Yes, the Equitas “Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC)” document lists several fees, and redemption governed by reward programme rules.
Key points:
• Joining / Annual Fees
• SELFE: ₹1,000 joining + ₹1,000 annual
• Cash Advance / ATM Withdrawal Charges
2.5% of the amount withdrawn (or ₹250, whichever is higher). Also, finance charges apply from day of withdrawal till full repayment.
• Other Charges / Fees
• The bank may levy other charges (late payment, over limit, return of payment, etc.) as per the Schedule of Charges in the Card Agreement / MITC.
• Redemption handling / administrative charges (if any) would be specified in the rewards programme terms (the MITC / catalogue) — it is possible that some redemptions may carry a small fee or conversion cost. (I didn’t find a publicly explicit “redemption fee” in the MITC I reviewed, so you will need to check the latest catalogue or rewards terms)
• Waiver of Annual Fee
• SELFE: Similarly, waiver if you cross a spending threshold (e.g., ₹2,40,000) in the year.
So yes — while redemption may not always incur a direct separate fee (depending on the option), there are various fees built into the cards’ terms, and you must see the “Schedule of Charges / rewards programme” for your card variant.

PowerMiles Credit Card – Apply Online & Earn Travel Rewards
The Equitas PowerMiles Credit Card is designed for frequent travelers and high-spend users who want to convert their spends into air miles or travel rewards. It offers interest-free credit periods, reward-points to miles conversion, and travel benefits like international lounge access, travel insurance, etc.
Card Benefits
Premium Metal Card
Experience luxury with a metal card
Luxury Memberships
Enjoy Exclusive Club Marriott & EazyDiner memberships
International Benefits
Enjoy a 2% Forex markup and 3x rewards on International purchases
Lounge Access
Complimentary airport lounge access* with 2 domestic visits & 1 international visit per quarter
1:1 Xchange
Redeem your reward points at a 1:1 ratio (1RP = 1 Miles/Points) for Miles transfer across select Airlines/Hotels (Feature to go live from Sep’26) & on our exclusive luxury catalogue
Premium Metal Card
Luxury Memberships
International Benefits
1:1 Xchange Other Benefits
Luxury Memberships
International Benefits
1:1 Xchange Other Benefits
Exclusive Luxury Memberships
Experience luxury with memberships from Club Marriott and EazyDiner. Enjoy premium dining and travel perks that elevate your lifestyle.
Club Marriott
Upto 25%* off on F&B, Hotel & Spa services. Get Complimentary Membership for Spouse. Visit Club Marriott for more information.
Eazydiner
25% - 50% Savings + complimentary beverages Welcome bonus of 2000 EazyPoints, 2X EazyPoints on every meal.
Global Travel Benefits
Enjoy exclusive advantages for international travel, including reduced forex markup, 3x reward points, and airport lounge access.
Forex
Low markup fee of 2% on all foreign currency transactions
3x Rewards
Earn triple the rewards on all international POS & online purchases, to make your spends more rewarding. (Ecom & online purchases mean the same)
Lounge Access
Enjoy 2 complimentary access per quarter at 40+ domestic lounges and 1 complimentary access per quarter at 1000+ international lounges
Exclusive Rewards
Redeem your reward points across a wide range of luxury partners.
1:1 Xchange Brands
Redeem your reward points at 1:1 ratio (1Rs.= ₹1) for luxury brands & experiences
1:1 Xchange Miles
Convert your reward points at 1:1 ratio to select Airlines/Hotels (Feature to be available from Sep’26)

Take advantage of global personal concierge services & comprehensive insurance benefits.
24X 7 Personal Concierge
Avail 24x7 global concierge services for your travel, entertainment and business purpose.
Zero Lost Card Liability
Zero liability for theft, fraud, or skimming after reporting the incident to the Bank

FAQs
What are the main credit card types? -
Power Miles Credit Card
Category: Travel Card
Best for: Frequent flyers and travel enthusiasts
Key Highlights:
• Get a premium metal card
• Enjoy luxury memberships with Club Marriott and EazyDiner.
• Get 3X rewards on International Spends
• Complimentary Airport Lounge Access at select domestic lounges (2 per calendar quarter) and International lounge (1 per calendar quarter)
• Accelerated Rewards on travel-related spends — flights, hotels, and more.
• Annual Fee: First Year Free (conditions apply).
• Insurance Benefits: Complimentary travel accident and lost card liability cover.
• Xchange brands: 1:1 exchange on Apple imagine, Tanishq, Taj, M&S, The Body Shop.
• 3RPs for every Rs 100 spent.
Ideal For:
Customers who travel frequently and want to accumulate travel points for flight tickets and enjoy airport lounge perks.
Features:
Focus: PowerMiles - Travel Rewards & Lounge Access
Reward Type: PowerMiles - Accelerated on Travel
Annual Fee: Powermiles - 1st Year Free
Ideal For: Powermiles - Frequent Travelers
How can I redeem Credit Card points for rewards? +
Equitas uses a rewards portal called Xchange (xchange.equitas.bank.in) for redeeming reward points.
You can redeem for products, vouchers, flight / hotel booking, etc. The card’s Terms & Conditions / MITC specifies the catalogue, valuation, and conditions for redemption.
The exact value per point / the minimum points required / where you can redeem depends on which card you have and which redemption option (product, voucher, travel) you select.
How do I apply for a Credit Card online? +
Visit the Equitas Bank Website’s Credit Cards section.
Choose the variant (TIGA, SELFE or PowerMiles) and click “Apply Now.” Or by giving missed call 1800 103 2977
You will be asked to provide KYC, identity, address, income proofs, etc., to complete an online / offline application form. (Standard card application flow implied)
The bank will verify your eligibility and documents and, if approved, dispatch the card. (You may also need to activate it with first transaction or PIN setup)
The application flow and decisioning may be instantaneous or take some time depending on internal checks.
What are the advantages of using Equitas Credit Cards? +
Here are the main benefits per card, plus general advantages:
PowerMiles Card Benefits
• Premium metal card, luxury memberships (Club Marriott, EazyDiner) included
• Lounge access (domestic + international) depending on card rules
• 3× rewards on international spends, plus ability to convert points to airline / hotel miles
• Fuel surcharge waiver, detection and Xchange program redemption options.
General Advantages
• Flexibility of interest-free credit period (if you pay full within due date)
• Rewards / points for your everyday spending
• Perks like fuel surcharge waiver, insurance, lounge access (for premium)
• Ability to convert large purchases into EMIs (for TIGA)
• Multiple redemption options via Equitas’s rewards portal
Are there any charges for redemption of reward points? +
Yes, the Equitas “Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC)” document lists several fees, and redemption governed by reward programme rules.
Key points:
• Joining / Annual Fees
• TIGA: ₹500 (joining) + ₹500 (annual)
• SELFE: ₹1,000 joining + ₹1,000 annual
• PowerMiles: ₹5,000 joining + ₹5,000 annual
• Cash Advance / ATM Withdrawal Charges
2.5% of the amount withdrawn (or ₹250, whichever is higher). Also, finance charges apply from day of withdrawal till full repayment.
• Other Charges / Fees
• The bank may levy other charges (late payment, over limit, return of payment, etc.) as per the Schedule of Charges in the Card Agreement / MITC.
•  Redemption handling / administrative charges (if any) would be specified in the rewards programme terms (the MITC / catalogue) — it is possible that some redemptions may carry a small fee or conversion cost. (I didn’t find a publicly explicit “redemption fee” in the MITC I reviewed, so you will need to check the latest catalogue or rewards terms)
• Waiver of Annual Fee
• TIGA: The annual fee may be waived if you spend a certain threshold in the anniversary year (as per terms)
• SELFE: Similarly, waiver if you cross a spending threshold (e.g., ₹2,00,000) in the year.
• PowerMiles: Waiver available if you spend a defined amount (e.g. ₹4,80,000) in the anniversary year.
So yes — while redemption may not always incur a direct separate fee (depending on the option), there are various fees built into the cards’ terms, and you must see the “Schedule of Charges / rewards programme” for your card variant.
How to register complaints related to my credit card? +
Register a complaint through the following ways:-
Selfe loan app
Customer care helpline number: 18001032977
Write to customerservice@equitas.bank.in from your registered mail id
You can also lodge a complaint at RBI’s Sachet Portal
Application forms complete in all respects will be processed within 30 days from the date of receipt of application form.
Wherever additional information / documentation is required to process the application form, the same shall be intimated to the customer within 30 days from the date of receipt of the application form.
